text:
Here is the complete Anthropic Claude API pricing as of April 2026, sourced directly from the official documentation.

---

## Standard Model Pricing (per million tokens)

| Model | Input | Output | 5-min Cache Write | 1-hour Cache Write | Cache Read/Hit |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Claude Opus 4.6** | $5.00 | $25.00 | $6.25 | $10.00 | $0.50 |
| **Claude Opus 4.5** | $5.00 | $25.00 | $6.25 | $10.00 | $0.50 |
| **Claude Opus 4.1** | $15.00 | $75.00 | $18.75 | $30.00 | $1.50 |
| **Claude Opus 4** | $15.00 | $75.00 | $18.75 | $30.00 | $1.50 |
| **Claude Sonnet 4.6** | $3.00 | $15.00 | $3.75 | $6.00 | $0.30 |
| **Claude Sonnet 4.5** | $3.00 | $15.00 | $3.75 | $6.00 | $0.30 |
| **Claude Sonnet 4** | $3.00 | $15.00 | $3.75 | $6.00 | $0.30 |
| **Claude Haiku 4.5** | $1.00 | $5.00 | $1.25 | $2.00 | $0.10 |
| **Claude Haiku 3.5** | $0.80 | $4.00 | $1.00 | $1.60 | $0.08 |

## Cache Pricing Multipliers

The cache costs follow simple multipliers relative to the base input price:

- **5-minute cache write**: 1.25x base input price
- **1-hour cache write**: 2x base input price
- **Cache read (hit)**: 0.1x base input price (90% savings)

Caching pays off after just **one read** for 5-minute caches, or **two reads** for 1-hour caches.

## Batch API Pricing (50% discount)

| Model | Batch Input | Batch Output |
|---|---|---|
| **Claude Opus 4.6** | $2.50 | $12.50 |
| **Claude Opus 4.5** | $2.50 | $12.50 |
| **Claude Opus 4.1** | $7.50 | $37.50 |
| **Claude Opus 4** | $7.50 | $37.50 |
| **Claude Sonnet 4.6** | $1.50 | $7.50 |
| **Claude Sonnet 4.5** | $1.50 | $7.50 |
| **Claude Sonnet 4** | $1.50 | $7.50 |
| **Claude Haiku 4.5** | $0.50 | $2.50 |
| **Claude Haiku 3.5** | $0.40 | $2.00 |

## Fast Mode (Opus 4.6 only)

- **Input**: $30/MTok
- **Output**: $150/MTok
- This is 6x the standard rate, designed for latency-sensitive workloads.

## Key Notes

- **Long context**: Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 include the full 1M token context window at standard pricing -- no surcharge for large requests.
- **Discount stacking**: Batch (50% off) and prompt caching (90% off reads) can be combined for up to ~95% savings.
- **Data residency**: Specifying US-only inference via `inference_geo` adds a 1.1x multiplier on all token categories (Opus 4.6 and newer only).
- **Notable price drop**: Opus 4.5/4.6 are 3x cheaper than Opus 4/4.1 ($5 vs $15 input, $25 vs $75 output) while being newer models.

Sources:
- [Pricing - Claude API Docs (Official)](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/about-claude/pricing)
- [Claude API Pricing 2026: Full Anthropic Cost Breakdown](https://www.metacto.com/blogs/anthropic-api-pricing-a-full-breakdown-of-costs-and-integration)
- [DevTk.AI Claude API Pricing Guide 2026](https://devtk.ai/en/blog/claude-api-pricing-guide-2026/)
